original_snippet_context: The overall text discusses the day's exchange rates and the effects of the presidential message on the market.
relevant_quote: A impres são produzida pela mensagem presi- dencial influiu menos do que se an- nunciava. e os factos o demonstram. tanto assim que o cambio subiu de 15 3|8 a 15 1|2, mas cahiu de 15 1|2 a lõ 5|8 d., do mesmo modo.
justification: This quote simply reports the fluctuations in the exchange rate and mentions the presidential message's impact without advocating for any specific monetary policy related to the Caixa de Conversão.
